## What changed
- Added PR template and self-review checklist to improve the review process.

## Why
- To make PRs easier to review and ensure changes are verified before merging.

## How to test
1. Verify that the file exists at `.github/pull_request_template.md`.
2. Check that at least one - [ ] checklist item is present.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have reviewed my changes before opening this PR
